_meta.notes: Curated patch_versions registry for WC3 Reforged. Only entries whose version string AND build_number are both independently confirmed are included. The 2.00/6117 pair is confirmed from the primary fixture replay (game-data/dumps/w3c-20260426112948.json). Other patches are intentionally omitted until their build numbers can be confirmed from actual replay headers — a small correct registry beats a large guessed one (CLAUDE.md Principle #4).
_meta.guardrail: Never add a row here based on guesswork. Each entry must have a source (replay header, Blizzard CDN, or CASC extraction) that confirms the exact build_number.

patches.notes: Confirmed from fixture replay header (w3c-20260426112948.json). Released_at is null — exact release date not independently confirmed.
